title: Simply Advancements
description: A datapack that expands on the vanilla advancement system by resurrecting old achievements, creating parity with Bedrock ones, and filling the gaps in progression - as well as adding some fun new challenges!
body:
**_NEW UPDATE COMING SOON!_**
**_This pack is actively being worked on!! I am finishing up testing and the last, largest, most difficult advancements. I expect to launch it with the release of 26.2 - Chaos Cubed_**

This pack is meant to expand upon the Vanilla Advancement system without going overkill. This pack adds back forgotten advancements such as _Bake Bread_, it also brings over some advancements from Bedrock edition, albeit with different names, and tweaks some Vanilla ones! Overall, this pack was designed with the idea of a new player in mind - helping them to discover unique game mechanics, patch the holes in progression, and showcase some of Minecraft's easter eggs.

All the Hidden Advancements are listed below.


I am working on the final advancement tab: Completionist! This one isn't for the faint of heart!

I hope you enjoy.


<details>
<summary>Hidden Advancements:</summary>

**Adventure Tab:**

- Arbalistic: _Kill five unique mobs with one crossbow arrow_
- Trick-or-Treat: _Kill a mob wearing a Carved Pumpkin_
- Captain Jack: _Kill a mob wearing a Jack-O-Lantern_
- The Spirit of Halloween: _Kill every mob that can wear a Jack-O-Lantern_
- This Doesn't Icha-Bode Well: _Kill every mob that can wear a Carved Pumpkin_
- Rider on a White Horse: _Ride on a Skeleton Horse_
- Eye Contact: _Look at an Enderman through a Spyglass_
- Hot Breeze: _Kill a Blaze with a redirected Wind Charge from a Breeze_
- Phantom of the Storm: _Strike a Phantom with Lightning_

**Aquatic:**

- Davy Jones Treasure: _Kill a Drowned holding a Trident and Nautilus Shell_
- Rainbow Fish: _Catch every axolotl variant!_
- Unsinkable: _Discover a shipwreck in a Frozen Ocean_

**Building:**

- Acting Sus: _Obtain a suspicious block_
- Framing the Art: _Put a painting inside an item frame_

**Enchanting:**

- Centurion: _Reach Level 100!_
- Prankster: _Put Curse of Binding on a Carved Pumpkin_
- Shell Game: _Put Respiration III and Aqua Affinity on a Turtle Shell_

**End:**

- Boo!: _Have the levitation, invisibility, and glowing effects at once in a soul sand valley_

**Homestead:**

- I've got an Ominous Feeling about this...: _Obtain Raid Omen V_
- Superhero of the Village: _Defeat a Tier V Raid!_
- Hidden Tribe: _Trade with a Jungle or Swamp Villager_

**Husbandry:**

- Birthday Song: _Have an Allay deliver a Cake to a Noteblock_
- Gonna Bounce: _Use wind charges to propel yourself up 50 blocks, then break your fall with a Slime Block!_
- I-Scream: _Get a Goat Horn from a Screaming Goat_
- The Cake is a Lie: _Get some cake_

**Minecraft:**

- 

**Nether:**

- How Did We Get Here: _Have every effect in the game at once_
- Feels Like Home: _Take a Strider for a long ride in the Overworld_
- A Ghastly Betrayal: _Bring a Ghast to the Overworld and then kill it while riding a Happy Ghast_

**Redstone:**

- On A Rail: _Travel 1000km in a minecart_

**Completionist:**

- Doctor Without Borders: _Cure one of every zombie villager profession from every village in the world!_

</details>



<details>
<summary>Upcoming Advancements:</summary>

- **Every Item:** _Obtain one of every item in Minecraft!_
- **Every Block:** _Obtain one of every block in Minecraft!_
- **Stacked!** _Obtain a stack of every item possible in Minecraft!_
- **Fanatic:** _Obtain a stack of the following blocks and items: Tall Grass, Tall Fern, Block of Netherite, Deepslate Emerald Ore, Recovery Compass, Disc Shards, Each Armor Trim, Each Pottery Sherd, Heavy Core_
- **_Hacker!_** _Obtain a stack of the following items you shouldn't be able to get: Suspicious Sand, Suspicious Gravel, Dragon Eggs (this is a hidden advancement)_

</details>
